MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
James M. Treppa, Esq. of BLEDSOE, CATHCART 981-5411, for defendants Lawrence Jue, Ann Jue, Mel Huey and Hogan & Vest, moving for summary judgment
Philip S. Horne, Esq., 552-2740, for plaintiff and opposing party
* A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified --
Re: C/A 1, 4, 5, 6 - Granted. No triable issue of fact re: damages
Re: C/A 13 - Granted. No triable issue of fact re: fraudulent representation
Re: C/A 11, 14 - Denied. Triable issue of fact exists re: damages.
Re: c/a 2, 7, 15 - Denied, not entitled to judgment as a matter of law.
Re: c/a 3 - Denied, not entitled to judgment as a matter of law.
Re: c/a 17 - Deneid, triable issue of fact exists re wrongful withholding of possession
of premises.
Re: c/a 19 - Denied per denial supra.
Plaintiff is to prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437 c(g). (DAG/301/CL) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
